panels.description: Wide shot: The Creature standing alone amidst vast, jagged glacier mountains under a cold, bleak, overcast sky. He is a looming, hulking figure with tattered clothes, looking toward the horizon.

bubbles.text: The ice is my only home. These bleak skies are kinder to me than man.

panels.description: Medium close-up: Frankenstein, face twisted in rage and disgust, pointing a finger at the Creature. Snow swirls around them, heavy shadows, intense lighting.

bubbles.text: Cursed be the day you saw light! Begone! Relieve me of your detested form!

panels.description: Medium shot: The Creature leads the way across treacherous ice toward a rocky cliff; Frankenstein follows with a wary, conflicted expression, shoulders slumped.

bubbles.text: My heart was full. I weighed his arguments... and decided to listen.

panels.description: Interior low-angle shot: A dark, humble hut. The Creature sits by a small fire he has lit, looking expectant. Frankenstein sits opposite him, leaning forward, face illuminated by the flickering firelight.

bubbles.text: It is with difficulty that I remember the original era of my being.
